'''√n-g-r''' ('''kanagar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maid|maid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maid|maid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-g-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanagar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thinagar || jinagar || shinagar || kinagar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthunagar || jujunagar || shushunagar || kukunagar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thunagar || junagar || shunagar || kunagar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thunagar || junagar || shunagar || kunagar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thenagar || jenagar || shenagar || kenagar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothonagar || jojonagar || shoshonagar || kokonagar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thonagar || jonagar || shonagar || konagar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thonagar || jonagar || shonagar || konagar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || nagar || nagar || nagar || nagar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || nagar || nagar || nagar || nagar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || nagar || nagar || nagar || nagar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || nagar || nagar || nagar || nagar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thænagar || jænagar || shænagar || kænagar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathanagar || jajanagar || shashanagar || kakanagar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thanagar || janagar || shanagar || kanagar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thanagar || janagar || shanagar || kanagar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shanagar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshanagar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishanagar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shanagarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshanagarnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishanagarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shanagarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshanagarnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishanagarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shanagarro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshanagarnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishanagarro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shanagarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshanagarnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishanagarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shanagarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshanagarnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishanagarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shanagarng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshanagarnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishanagarng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shanagarya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshanagarnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishanagarya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shanagaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshanagarnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishanagaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shanagarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshanagarnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishanagarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shanagarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanagarnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanagarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shanagarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshanagarnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanagarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shanagarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshanagarnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishanagarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shanagarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanagarnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanagarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shanagarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshanagarnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanagarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shanagarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshanagarnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishanagarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shanagarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshanagarnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishanagarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shanagarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshanagarnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanagarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shanagarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshanagarnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishanagarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shanagarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshanagarnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishanagarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shanagarmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanagarnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanagarmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
